mnemonics: CIA in the Cloud: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability are the core security triad for continuous evaluation.
keyPoints: Continuous monitoring is essential for detecting security threats in real-time.
Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies must be rigorously enforced.
Data encryption, both at rest and in transit, is a non-negotiable security requirement.
commonMistakes: Neglecting to configure and monitor logging and alerting systems, leaving threats undetected.
Using overly permissive IAM roles and policies, creating unnecessary attack surfaces.
